briefing.headline: Global intelligence: ai & technology and geopolitics.
briefing.summary: This week's highest-signal global coverage centers on ai & technology and geopolitics. Key headlines: Nvidia posts record profit of $58.3bn amid AI chip boom - Al Jazeera; Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO filing is out - Axios. The desk weighted editorial importance and recency — not every headline warrants action.
briefing.editorsNote: No single story dominated globally; the value is in cross-sector pattern recognition.
